name: One-Pan Potatoes and Pork Provencale
recipeIngredient: 4 medium potatoes, cut into ¾-inch cubes
1 pound lean pork, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave the potatoes for 6-10 minutes or until tender.
2. Meanwhile, heat oil in a large skillet over high heat.
3. Add pork and toss until opaque.
4. Drain excess fat from the pork.
5. Add potatoes and tomatoes; sauté and toss for 3 minutes.
6. Add marmalade and mustard; toss until the marmalade is melted.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
